name: certi
title: certi
summary: Tool to ask certificates to ADCS and discover templates
description:
Tool to ask certificates to ADCS and discover templates
Certi is an utility to play with ADCS, allows one to request tickets and
collect information about related objects. Basically, it's the impacket copy
of Certify.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use certi because Tool to ask certificates to ADCS and discover templates.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use certi as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `certi [options] [args]` as documented upstream for certi.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair certi with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `certi --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
